assets.prompt: 8-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Shot: a grand casino floor transformed into a stadium — dark emerald turf underfoot, gold floodlights above. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress and gold whistle on a chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture, standing on the center circle. Movement: slow push-in from low angle. Character action: she raises the gold whistle, blows it, and a burst of gold confetti erupts as a soccer ball at her feet morphs into a spinning gold casino chip. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic, floodlight flares. Atmosphere: electric kickoff energy, floating gold particles. Audio cue: sharp whistle, crowd roar swell, deep drum hit. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold.

Wide heroic full-body shot. A luxury casino floor styled as a night stadium: dark emerald green turf floor with a white center circle, gold floodlights cutting through light haze. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress and gold whistle on a chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture. Pose: standing tall at the center circle, one hand lifting the gold whistle, chin high. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic. Mood: commanding, opening-ceremony grandeur. Foreground: a single oversized gold casino chip resting on the penalty spot. Background: stadium floodlights as casino spotlights, bokeh crowd glow. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle, full body, slight wide lens.

Dramatic product-style close-up. A gleaming solid-gold soccer boot overflowing with gold casino chips and coins, set on dark emerald turf under a single spotlight. Pose/action: coins spilling in mid-fall, frozen. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic, deep black vignette. Mood: trophy-room prestige, quiet anticipation. Foreground: scattered gold coins catching light on the turf. Background: pure darkness with faint stadium floodlight beams. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: eye-level macro, shallow depth of field, vertical composition.

Medium warm portrait shot. An elegant gold-trimmed welcome table at the entrance of a stadium-styled casino lounge, dark emerald drapes with gold cords. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress and gold whistle on a chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture. Pose: leaning slightly forward, extending one gloved hand toward camera in warm invitation, genuine welcoming smile. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, soft and flattering, cinematic. Mood: 'you belong here' warmth, VIP hospitality. Foreground: a gold gift box with emerald ribbon on the table. Background: soft-focus stadium tunnel glowing gold. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: eye level, medium shot, viewer-as-guest perspective.

Playful full-body action shot. Dark emerald turf casino floor, gold floodlights, light haze. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, holding a 4-leaf clover in one hand. Pose/action: mid-juggle, a soccer ball bouncing comically off the brim of his fishing hat, arms flailing happily. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic. Mood: lovable underdog, big laugh energy. Foreground: a stray gold chip near his mismatched socks. Background: goal net dripping gold coins, softly out of focus. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: slightly low angle, full body, vertical composition.

Dramatic centered shot. A giant gold prize wheel designed like a luxury stadium clock face, gold segments alternating with deep emerald segments, mounted against a black stadium wall. Pose/action: the wheel frozen mid-spin with motion blur on its edges, gold light streaks trailing. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, rim-lit edges, cinematic. Mood: ticking urgency, midnight-deadline tension. Foreground: a gold pointer arrow catching a bright glint. Background: dark stadium stands with faint floodlight beams. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: straight-on, centered, vertical composition.

Cinematic table-level shot. A card table surfaced with dark emerald stadium turf instead of felt, gold trim rail. Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still. Pose/action: his gloved hand fanning exactly three gold-backed playing cards onto the turf felt, precise and silent. Lighting: single warm directional gold light from above, hard shadows, cinematic noir. Mood: mystery, high-stakes reveal. Foreground: three gold cards glowing softly on emerald turf. Background: the dealer's shadowed figure, black void behind. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low table-level angle, shallow depth of field.

Symbolic wide shot. A night stadium penalty area: dark emerald turf, white penalty spot, and a goal whose net is dripping strings of gold coins that pool beneath it. Pose/action: a single oversized gold casino chip spinning upright on the penalty spot, motion-blurred edges, mid-spin. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above like a floodlight column, cinematic. Mood: the perfect assist, shared victory. Foreground: the spinning chip casting a long warm shadow. Background: goal net glittering with falling gold coins, dark stands beyond. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: knee-height wide shot facing the goal.

6-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Shot: noir card table with dark emerald turf surface, black void around it. Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still except his hands. Movement: locked-off camera, slow subtle push-in. Character action: he deals three cards one by one onto the turf; each card ignites a small controlled gold flare as it lands; on the third flare he gives the faintest nod. Lighting: single warm directional gold overhead beam, hard noir shadows. Atmosphere: silent tension, dust motes in the gold beam. Audio cue: three crisp card snaps, low bass pulse, distant crowd hush. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold.

Energetic celebration group shot. A stadium-styled casino floor at night, emerald turf, gold confetti raining. Four to five diverse players, men and women of varied ethnicities in stylish summer-casual outfits with subtle green and gold accents. Pose/action: hoisting together a gleaming gold trophy-style cup overflowing with gold casino chips, heads back laughing, one on another's shoulders, locker-room trophy-lift energy. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above plus stadium floodlight flares, cinematic. Mood: pure communal joy, championship parade. Foreground: confetti and a few chips mid-air. Background: floodlights and dark stands with golden bokeh. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: slightly low wide angle capturing the whole group.

Moody countdown shot. A small ornate gold gift chest sitting exactly on the white penalty spot of dark emerald night turf, lid cracked open with warm gold light leaking out. Pose/action: faint gold mist rising from the chest seam. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above narrowing like a closing spotlight, cinematic. Mood: last-call urgency, quiet ticking clock. Foreground: the chest's gold clasp glinting. Background: a huge blurred stadium clock face glowing faintly in the dark stands. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low close angle on the chest, vertical composition.

Comedic frozen-moment shot. Night stadium casino floor, emerald turf, a goal frame made of polished gold. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile turned into an open-mouthed gasp, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, a 4-leaf clover tucked in his hat band. Pose/action: both hands on his head in classic 'so close' despair-joy as a large gold casino chip rattles off the crossbar above him, chip frozen mid-bounce. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic. Mood: hilarious heartbreak, everyone-has-been-there. Foreground: turf blades catching gold light. Background: gold goal frame and dark stands. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle behind Lou toward the goal, vertical composition.

Mysterious reveal shot. A dark stadium tunnel at midnight, walls of black stone with thin gold inlay lines. Pose/action: a massive circular vault door half-open at the tunnel's end, intense warm gold light and slow-drifting gold particles pouring through the gap onto emerald turf that begins at the tunnel mouth. Lighting: warm directional gold light source entirely from within the vault, cinematic, deep shadows. Mood: mystery drop, second-half surprise. Foreground: a lone gold chip on the turf catching the vault light. Background: the glowing vault seam and swirling gold dust. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: centered one-point perspective down the tunnel, vertical composition.

8-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Shot: night stadium casino floor, emerald turf, polished gold goal frame, lights dimmed to deep gold. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, 4-leaf clover in hand. Movement: slow-motion tracking shot. Character action: he rolls a large gold chip toward the goal; it strikes the post, teeters agonizingly, then drops in; gold confetti cannon bursts as he falls to his knees and lifts his 4-leaf clover overhead like a trophy. Lighting: warm directional gold floodlight, lens flare on the confetti burst, cinematic. Atmosphere: extra-time drama flipping to euphoria, floating gold particles. Audio cue: heartbeat thumps, post 'ping', eruption of crowd roar and airhorn. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold.

assets.post_time: used in reels 01 and 15; optional 8:30 PM story
assets.prompt: Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Song: 'Golden Kick' — Afrobeats/Trap fusion stadium anthem, BPM 105, key F minor. Instruments: log drums, 808 sub, brass stabs, shekere percussion, stadium crowd swells, airhorn accents, gold-bell melody. Structure and lyrics: INTRO: '(whistle blows) Oh-oh-oh... you hear the drums? / The road ends Sunday but the gold's already come'. VERSE 1: 'Floodlights on, turf like emerald money / Crown on my head, yeah the future's looking sunny / Ninety minutes? No, we play all day / Chips on the spot, watch me put 'em in play'. PRE-CHORUS: 'One touch, two touch, feel the stadium sway / Every heart in here beating one way'. CHORUS: 'Golden kick, golden kick — let it fly, let it hit / Top corner of the night, every spin is a hit / Golden kick, golden kick — hands up if you're with it / We don't chase, we celebrate — that's how legends did it'. VERSE 2: 'Lou on the wing with the clover in his grip / Post, then in — that's a champion trip / Dealer flips three, now the rush goes loud / E on the whistle with the gold-lit crowd'. BRIDGE: '(crowd swell) When the lights go low and the vault swings wide / Extra time is where the magic hides / Oh-oh-oh... hold the line / The second half always surprises — every time'. FINAL CHORUS: 'Golden kick, golden kick — let it fly, let it hit / Top corner of the night, every spin is a hit / Golden kick, golden kick — crown up if you're with it / Road to the final, and you're already in it'. OUTRO: '(whistle, long) Oh-oh-oh... see you at Golden Hour / Lady E Luck — where every kick turns gold'. Emotion: triumphant, warm, commanding. Pacing: driving but smooth. Notes: female lead with rich lower register, stacked harmonies on chorus, crowd chant layer on final chorus.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'The whole world is watching the road to the final. But the gold? The gold lives here. Welcome to match day at Lady E Luck.' Emotion: commanding, warm, regal excitement. Pacing: measured, letting each phrase land, slight lift on the last line. Notes: subtle smile in the voice; a beat of silence before 'Welcome'.

Voice: The Golden Dealer. Preset: Sterling. Voice ID: dc382508-c8bd-443c-8cb2-46e57b8d2e6f. Text: 'Three times. Three wins.' Emotion: cool, quiet menacing elegance. Pacing: very slow, a full pause between the two sentences. Notes: near-whisper baritone, no reverb tail, this is his only sentence of the day.

Voice: Lucky Lou. Preset: Leo. Voice ID: 73a45c18-0c56-4642-a61e-f6b303f8ded1. Text: 'Off the post... AND IN! Extra time, baby! I TOLD you the clover works! Golden Hour, let's GO!' Emotion: breathless disbelief exploding into pure joy. Pacing: slow tense start, then rapid-fire celebration. Notes: genuine laugh breaking through on the final line.
